rulings.Case Title: STANLEY G HILTON VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 19, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANTs JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A, CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY and DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend as to both causes of action. First cause of action to allege grounds for tender rule exception. Third cause of action - last leave to allege all elements with particularity. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MIREYA THUMAS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Evidentiary Hearing And To Postpont Nonjudicial Foreclosure; Memo Of P&A
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 19, 2012, line 1. PLAINTIFF MIREYA THUMAS' Motion For Evidentiary Hearing And To Postpone Nonjudicial Foreclosure. Off calendar, moving party failed to comply with court order of mar. 26, 2012 and San Francisco Local Rule 2.6b and alternatively untimley filed, April 11 for April 19 hearing. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EVANS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. GUSTAVO RIOS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And Place Case On Active Calendar
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 19, 2012, line 5. PLAINTIFF EVANS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.'s Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And Place Case On Active Calendar. Grant, subject to sanctions to defendant's counsel in the amount of $731.25, payable within five days. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 50 BRONTE LLC VS. CLARINDO GOMES et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 19, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANTs CLARINDO GOMES, JANETE GOMEZ and DOE SILVA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. Demurrer improper means to introduce claim of right to possession. Moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C in the future. = (501/REQ)
